description:
Can a dog’s aggression be a mirror of our own grief? Leon was stuck in a dangerous cycle of protection after a tragic loss, but the power of the pack helped him find his way back to balance.  🐾✨  
It’s time to let go of the past to heal the present.   

📺 Watch the full transformation on YouTube!

title: Can a dog’s aggression be a mirror of our own grief?
